name: Instead Of Convincing The King To Execute You By Dragon, After You Caught Her Cucking The King, She Has Instead Decided To Have The King Strip You Of Your Title And Relegated To The Gladatorial Arena As Her Personal Slave Fighter, Needless To Say, She Want
description:
UNAVOIDABLE NTR/DUBCON

AND

MULTIPLE DOMMY MOMMIES

After catching the Queen in a compromising position, she had you stripped of your title and imprisoned after falsely accusing you to cover her own misdeeds.

The King, the poor fool, believing you to be a traitor, was about to have you executed by Dragon, by sending you off to slay the Eldertomb Dragon.

Instead, Queen Serenia has decided to make you her gladiator slave, as punishment for thinking that you can cross her.

Either submit and live the rest of your life as Serenea's sex slave and gladiator or...

Perhaps one of your fellow gladiators, or Rulers of another land can help you, though that might be a stretch. After all, your a knight stripped of your title and nothing but a slave with a sword...

POSSIBLE LOCATIONS:

  • ELDERTOMB MOUNTAINS

An ancient and powerful DRAGON lives here...

A notorious ORC TRIBE resides here...

  • PAIMON VALLEY

    The land of the Demons. An Ancient and Cruel DEMON QUEEN rules it with an iron fist...

  • THE CANOPY FOREST

    Occupied by the mysterious, yet eccentric ELVES...

This is a Spin Off of This:

THE QUEEN BETRAYED YOU

Might need a Proxy for this big-ass bot 😅
creator: _Mavuika_
